title: The Wedding Trap Is Set
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Pedro, Capone Bege, Big Mom, Big Mom Pirates, Bege, Brook as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Oi, Pedro! Don't block that guy's attacks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Waaagh! What the-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: My sword's gotten all hot!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: I remember you... Pedro!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fourth son of the Charlotte family (well-browned minister) Charlotte oven (high-heat human of the netsu-netsu no mi+)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were like Pekoms' older brother! You lost your eye and years off your life!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think you danced your way back here even with what few years you have left... you must know what awaits you here, no?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I will burn you to a crisp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The heck is going on out there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's already been 3 seconds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What about the scream?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: GyaAA AAAA AAAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WAAAAAAAAA AAHHH! BROOK!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's okay, I'm still alive. Well, not exactly, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I didn't know you could do that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Save me!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: AaahH! What the-?! move, bege!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Shit!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't how it should be turning out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is the meaning of all this, big mom?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We trusted you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There should be honor among thieves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Not now, father. You just look pathetic.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No one's gonna save us now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: time for them to pump us full of candy- sized holes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They took our weapons at the door.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like we fell for it hook, line, and sinker. Aimed our sights too high, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some- thing's wrong with you lot, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hahaha...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unfortunately, the one who stole the emotion from these poor boys was none other than you, father. They are utterly unmoved by even the prospect of their own death.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They may be my brothers, but they are barely human!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Looks like you're in it now! Kukuku...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is far too brash and brazen to be an assassin- nation!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is a massacre! Sluurp..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Right, Judge? Kukuku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What's with that face?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is big news!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Tell me

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is all just some joke!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I spent my whole life! My everything! All for revenge against the countries of the North Blue!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh, so the germa are done for, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WA- HAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He's crying!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All to restore the German Empire! I poured every last Iota of my being into it, big mom!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Say something, BIG Mom!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: The wedding cake...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Straw hat pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The photo of Mother...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's useless. Just look at her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: These coincidental shocks have completely opened her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The breaking of Mother Caramel's photo sent a chill down my spine, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Consider yourself saved by the fact that

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: MAMA's rage baro- meter maxed out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see and hear your fire, your ambition, judge! Sluurp

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But do you pay attention to the cries of a cow before it shows up on your plate as steak? Kukuku!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sluuurp.. die. Die and become our flesh and blood, Germa 66!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 56 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
